title: Pan-Seared Potato Wedges
description: A crispy and delicious snack made with pan-seared potato wedges, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Cut the potatoes into wedges and soak in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
Fry the potatoes in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the potatoes from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Season the potatoes with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the potato wedges hot and enjoy!
